composeFile:
version: '3.8'
services:
  minio:
    image: minio/minio
    container_name: minio
    environment:
      MINIO_ROOT_USER: admin
      MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD: AgroHoney2026!
      MINIO_BROWSER_REDIRECT_URL: https://minio.agrohoney.com
      MINIO_SERVER_URL: https://s3.agrohoney.com
    volumes:
      - minio_data:/data
    command: server /data --console-address ":9001"
    restart: always
    labels:
      - "traefik.enable=true"
      - "traefik.http.middlewares.minio-limit.buffering.maxRequestBodyBytes=1073741824"
      - "traefik.http.routers.minio-api-r.middlewares=minio-limit"
      - "traefik.http.routers.minio-console-r.middlewares=minio-limit"
      - "traefik.http.routers.minio-api.middlewares=minio-limit"
      - "traefik.http.routers.minio-console.middlewares=minio-limit"

volumes:
  minio_data:
